inputs.text:
Create a clean, premium, modern social-media card news carousel for a B2B SaaS product called “GO-Chatbot”.

Design a Korean-language 8-card carousel for Instagram and LinkedIn.
Style: modern SaaS marketing, clean white background with deep blue and cyan accents, subtle gradients, dashboard UI mockups, simple icons, minimal but premium layout, readable typography, strong visual hierarchy, no clutter.

Brand positioning:
GO-Chatbot is a SaaS AI chatbot that can be installed by adding a site URL or uploading FAQ/manual files. It provides 24/7 automated customer support.

Target audience:
small business owners, solo professionals, ecommerce operators, and enterprise teams.

Main message:
“사이트만 등록하세요. AI가 24시간 응대합니다”

Cards:
1. Hook card: strong headline about missed inquiries and 24/7 AI response
2. Problem card: lost leads, night/weekend inquiries, repetitive CS burden
3. Solution card: install in 15 minutes with 8 lines of script
4. How it works card: upload FAQ/manuals or register website URL, AI learns automatically
5. Differentiator card: page context analysis + 4-Path hybrid search
6. Feature card: Vision, API Hub, multi-LLM, on-premise support
7. Trust card: Korean server, HTTPS, tenant isolation, RBAC, 14-day free trial, starting at 31,900 KRW
8. CTA card: “14일 무료 체험 시작하기” and “기업 도입 문의”

Requirements:
- Render all Korean text clearly and legibly
- Use concise Korean copy
- Each card should focus on one message only
- Include small UI/dashboard mockups where useful
- Keep spacing polished and typography highly readable
- No unnecessary stock-photo feeling
- Make the set visually consistent across all 8 cards, photorealistic, detailed, high quality, 8k
